construction.panels: Standard two-panel construction with side seams, featuring a full-garment sublimation print.
construction.seams: Standard machine stitching, tonal to the printed graphic, no visible contrast or flatlock stitching.
construction.closures: Internal white drawstring with an elastic waistband.
construction.details: Elastic waistband, internal drawstring, hemmed leg openings. No visible pockets from the front view.

graphics.content: Panoramic image of the Bay Bridge and Oakland/San Francisco cityscape, featuring the bridge structure prominently over water with a blue sky background.
graphics.location: Full front and wrapping around the sides of the shorts

graphics.content: Stylized blue rose graphic with green leaves/stem.
graphics.location: Lower right thigh, integrated into the main sublimation print.

fabric_appearance: Mesh knit, visible perforations, smooth texture typical of athletic shorts.
unique_features: Full-garment sublimation print depicting the iconic Bay Bridge and Oakland cityscape, part of 'The Bridge Series'.
collection_aesthetic: The Bay Bridge graphic directly references Oakland, aligning with SkyyRose's 'Oakland luxury streetwear' identity. The detailed, full-coverage print elevates the athletic shorts to a statement piece, embodying a blend of local pride and high-quality design.
